label: ShipStation
description: Multi-carrier shipping and label printing platform for ecommerce, connecting orders to carriers and automating fulfillment.

form.title: Connect ShipStation
form.subtitle: Paste your ShipStation API key and secret to start syncing orders, shipments, and labels.

methods.label: API Key + Secret
methods.description: Paste your ShipStation API key and secret from Account Settings → API Settings. No OAuth setup required — the simplest and recommended path.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with API Key + Secret

ShipStation uses HTTP Basic Auth with your API key as the username and API secret as the password. Both are available in your ShipStation account settings.

### Steps

1. Log in to [ShipStation](https://app.shipstation.com/).
2. Click your account name in the top-right corner and select **Account Settings**.
3. In the left sidebar, navigate to **Account → API Settings**.
4. If you don't see an existing key, click **Generate New API Key** — this creates both the key and secret together.
5. Copy the **API Key** and **API Secret** values.
6. Paste them into the fields below.

### Notes

- The API secret is shown on the API Settings page and can be regenerated at any time. Regenerating invalidates the old secret immediately — update Anton if you do this.
- If you are on a multi-user account, each user can have their own API key scoped to their permissions.
- ShipStation's API has a rate limit of 40 requests per 30 seconds per store. Anton respects this automatically.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in ShipStation → Account Settings → API Settings.

fields.name: api_secret
fields.label: API Secret
fields.description: Paired with your API key — found on the same API Settings page.

fields.name: store_id
fields.label: Store ID (optional)
fields.description: Numeric ShipStation store ID to scope requests to a specific store. Leave blank to access all stores on the account.
